emphasize: Unique, intriguing, or paradoxical character concepts in titles (e.g., 'Invisible Painter', 'Boy Who Collected Stars').
Explicitly specify the animation style (e.g., '3D Animated Short') in the title for animated content.
Themes focused on hidden talent, true creativity, or unlocking potential.
Using clear separators (like '|') to structure titles, separating the main concept from the descriptive elements.
avoid: Overly generic or broad themes like 'heartwarming stories,' 'hope and unity,' or general 'memories' without a unique narrative hook.
Character descriptions that are common or lack an element of mystery or an unusual attribute (e.g., 'Lantern Keeper').
Using emojis in the primary title, as they did not correlate with higher view counts in the top-performing shorts.
